title: Deku's Miracle Addon
description: Addon for Nastia's Miracle Stones that adds Polish Miraculouses
body:
This mod is an addon for Nastia's Miracle Stones mod that adds Polish Miraculouses. The point of it is to complete the mod with custom Miraculouses from Poland.

Required mods: **Geckolib**, **Curios API**, **Kleider's Custom Renderer**, **Nastia's Miracle Stones**

## What does this mod add?

```
This mod adds magical jewelry - Miraculouses
They let you summon a creature called kwami that will let you transform into an animal-themed superhero ( or supervillain ). 
You will get superhuman strength, speed and jumping ability. 
User will also get a magical weapon with many functions and applications.
```

This mod will add following Miraculouses:


```
🐶 Polish Lowland Sheepdog
🦬 European Bison
🦫 Beaver
🦅 White Eagle
🐦 White Stork
🦔 Hedgehog
🫎 Moose
🐗 Boar
🦦 Pine marten 
🐟 Pike 
```

## Screenshots

![Sheepdog Miraculous Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b1149c500a5b3099bbcde36c758bf87e8cbc302.png)


🐛|How to report issues?
---
To report any bugs join my Discord server and write what's the issue in the bug reports channel. When you do it, please be specific:
1. Check if that bug wasn't reported before
2. Say what's the issue in details and not like "That doesn't work"
3. If possible show screenshots and videos
4. Try on new world and say if it still happens

Why join my Discord server?
---
- You can suggest new features for this and the other mods I'm making
- You will receive help there for all my developed projects
- You can discuss the mods with other people there
- You can have fun :D

           Where to contact me?           
      Mod Discord: https://discord.com/invite/45RyYKZjbC    
      DMs on Discord: ._afton.
